description: Create final comprehensive evidence figure with genomic context, PANTHER tree structure, and failure mode assessment
code:
import matplotlib
matplotlib.use('Agg')
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import matplotlib.patches as mpatches
from matplotlib.patches import FancyArrowPatch

fig, axes = plt.subplots(3, 1, figsize=(16, 14))
fig.suptitle('Q72DT2 (aprA): Complete Evidence for Mis-annotation as Succinate Dehydrogenase', 
             fontsize=14, fontweight='bold', y=0.98)

# Panel A: Genomic context
ax = axes[0]
ax.set_title('A. Genomic Context in D. vulgaris Hildenborough', fontweight='bold', fontsize=11)

# aprBA-qmo operon
y_apr = 0.7
genes_apr = [
    (0.05, 0.15, 'aprB\n(DVU_0846)\nEC 1.8.99.2', '#81D4FA'),
    (0.18, 0.33, 'aprA\n(DVU_0847)\nEC 1.8.99.2\n← Q72DT2', '#F44336'),
    (0.36, 0.48, 'qmoA\n(DVU_0848)\nElectron\ndonor', '#FFE082'),
]
ax.text(0.02, y_apr + 0.15, 'aprBA-qmo operon\n(Sulfate reduction)\nPosition: ~933 kb', 
        fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', va='center', color='#1565C0')
for x1, x2, label, color in genes_apr:
    arrow = FancyArrowPatch((x1, y_apr), (x2, y_apr), arrowstyle='->', 
                            mutation_scale=20, lw=18, color=color, alpha=0.8)
    ax.add_patch(arrow)
    ax.text((x1+x2)/2, y_apr - 0.15, label, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7)

# frd operon
y_frd = 0.3
genes_frd = [
    (0.05, 0.12, 'frdC\n(DVU_3261)\nCyt b', '#CE93D8'),
    (0.15, 0.30, 'fdrA\n(DVU_3262)\nEC 1.3.5.1\n← Q726C9', '#4CAF50'),
    (0.33, 0.43, 'frdB\n(DVU_3263)\nFe-S', '#FFB74D'),
]
ax.text(0.02, y_frd + 0.15, 'frd operon\n(Fumarate reduction)\nPosition: ~3437 kb', 
        fontsize=8, fontweight='bold', va='center', color='#2E7D32')
for x1, x2, label, color in genes_frd:
    arrow = FancyArrowPatch((x1, y_frd), (x2, y_frd), arrowstyle='->', 
                            mutation_scale=20, lw=18, color=color, alpha=0.8)
    ax.add_patch(arrow)
    ax.text((x1+x2)/2, y_frd - 0.15, label, ha='center', va='center', fontsize=7)

# Annotations
ax.text(0.55, y_apr, 'APS + 2e⁻ → AMP + sulfite', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', 
        va='center', color='#D32F2F',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='#FFCDD2', alpha=0.8))
ax.text(0.55, y_frd, 'Fumarate + 2H → Succinate', fontsize=10, fontweight='bold', 
        va='center', color='#1B5E20',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.3', facecolor='#C8E6C9', alpha=0.8))

ax.text(0.85, 0.5, 'DIFFERENT\noperons\nDIFFERENT\nenzymes\nDIFFERENT\nreactions', 
        fontsize=9, fontweight='bold', va='center', ha='center', color='#B71C1C',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round,pad=0.5', facecolor='#FFEBEE', edgecolor='red', alpha=0.9))

ax.set_xlim(0, 1)
ax.set_ylim(0, 1)
ax.axis('off')

# Panel B: PANTHER subfamily assignments comparison
ax = axes[1]
ax.set_title('B. PANTHER Subfamily Assignments: Correct vs. Incorrect', fontweight='bold', fontsize=11)
ax.axis('off')

# Draw the tree-like structure
tree_text = """
PANTHER Family PTHR11632: "SUCCINATE DEHYDROGENASE 2 FLAVOPROTEIN SUBUNIT"
(Actually covers SdhA + FrdA + AprA superfamily)
│
├── SF51: "SDH [UBIQUINONE] FLAVOPROTEIN, MITOCHONDRIAL"
│   ├── Hs SDHA (P31040) ✅ Correct placement
│   ├── Ec SdhA (P0AC41) ✅ Correct placement
│   └── Q72DT2 (aprA)    ❌ WRONG! AprA placed here by TreeGrafter
│       └── → Propagates GO:0000104 (SDH activity) ← ERROR
│
├── SF71: "FUMARATE REDUCTASE FLAVOPROTEIN SUBUNIT"
│   ├── Ec FrdA (P00363)  ✅ Correct placement
│   └── Q726C9 (fdrA)     ✅ Correct placement (D. vulgaris actual FRD)
│
└── (No AprA-specific subfamily exists!)
    └── Q72DT2 should be here → with GO:0009973 (APS reductase activity)
"""
ax.text(0.02, 0.98, tree_text, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=8.5,
        fontfamily='monospace', verticalalignment='top',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#FFF3E0', alpha=0.9))

# Panel C: Failure mode assessment summary
ax = axes[2]
ax.set_title('C. Three Failure Modes: Assessment Summary', fontweight='bold', fontsize=11)
ax.axis('off')

summary_text = """
┌────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐
│  FAILURE MODE                      │  ASSESSMENT   │  KEY EVIDENCE                         │
├────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────│
│  1. Granularity (family vs subfam) │  N/A          │  Not a granularity issue; the term     │
│                                    │               │  names a DIFFERENT activity entirely    │
├────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────│
│  2. Pseudo-enzyme / lost activity  │  RULED OUT    │  AprA-specific catalytic residues       │
│                                    │               │  (Arg317, FAD N5) are conserved;        │
│                                    │               │  active enzyme in D. vulgaris (PMID:    │
│                                    │               │  23842468); Sp. activity 11-14 U/mg     │
├────────────────────────────────────┼───────────────┼───────────────────────────────────────│
│  3. Within-superfamily             │  ★ CONFIRMED  │  AprA placed in SdhA subfamily SF51.    │
│     mis-placement                  │  ★            │  Covalent FAD His ABSENT. InterPro      │
│                                    │               │  correctly calls IPR011803 (AprA).       │
│                                    │               │  Reviewed ortholog has same error.        │
│                                    │               │  Same organism has real FrdA (Q726C9)     │
│                                    │               │  in different operon with correct SF71.   │
└────────────────────────────────────┴───────────────┴───────────────────────────────────────┘

VERDICT: WRONG SUBFAMILY (MIS-PLACED) — GO:0000104 should be REPLACED with GO:0009973
"""
ax.text(0.02, 0.95, summary_text, transform=ax.transAxes, fontsize=8,
        fontfamily='monospace', verticalalignment='top',
        bbox=dict(boxstyle='round', facecolor='#E8F5E9', alpha=0.9))

plt.tight_layout(rect=[0, 0, 1, 0.96])
plt.savefig('final_evidence_summary.png', dpi=150, bbox_inches='tight')
plt.show()
print("Figure saved: final_evidence_summary.png")
